$schema: Feature specification for the software factory pipeline

fields.name: field_name
fields._comment: kind: string | number | boolean | enum | date | uuid | json

fields.name: amount
fields._comment: numbers map to DECIMAL or INTEGER based on context

fields.name: is_active
fields._comment: booleans get NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE unless specified otherwise

fields.name: secret_token
fields._comment: sensitive fields: excluded from response DTOs, stored via vault, redacted in logs

_integrations_comment: Available: vault, audit, notifications, caching, search, file-upload

custom_methods.name: setDefault
custom_methods.description: Set this entity as the default, unsetting any previous default
custom_methods._comment: optional — for business logic beyond basic CRUD

compliance._comment: If true, adds security verification gates and migration approval
